scope.target: Make repo-structure-sync the owner of evidence-based .dev/project-config.yaml generation.
constraints: Do not invent project facts for empty repositories.
Use placeholders for credentials and environment-specific values.
non_goals: No source generator or compiled project-config tool.

steps: Update scan, document target, migration, and output rules.
Update the human guide and wrapper references.
Remove the source-product root project config.
